cause_analysis.narrative: Djemi Hair Braiding churned on 2026-02-24 after 185 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-04-14 via email — -49 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
